title: ADDICTION SERVICES - 211info
text: ROSEBURG DETOXIFICATION ADDICTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of care for substance use and co-occurring behavioral health disorders that includes medical detox, residential care, and after care. 3099 NE Diamond Lake Boulvard Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Most services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Medication-assisted treatment: 7 days per week 6:30am-2:30pm, by appointment only (541) 492-0206 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 492-0206 Adult Residential Adult Residential Intake (541) 492-0222 Detox Services INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: Accepts most major insurance plans, Oregon Health Plan, and Medicare. Offers a sliding scale fee for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, and Josephine Counties Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSEBURG DETOXIFICATION
